messages.content: How do I optimize React component re-renders?
Use React.memo, useMemo, and useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders. Also consider lifting state up or using context properly.
How to optimize PostgreSQL query performance?
Use EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify slow queries, add indexes on frequently queried columns, and consider partitioning large tables.
What are best practices for user onboarding flow?
Keep it simple, show value quickly, use progressive disclosure, and include clear CTAs. Also track completion rates to identify friction points.
Discussed timeline for Q1 deliverables. Team agreed on 2-week sprints. Action items: Update Jira, schedule weekly syncs, create shared calendar.
